title: FILE - A patron passes a painting inside the International UFO Museum and Research Center in Roswell, N.M., on June 10, 1997.
description: A 2021 survey conducted by Pew Research Center showed about two-thirds of Americans said their best guess is that intelligent life exists on other planets.

title: A History of UFO Sightings and Investigations Since WWII
description: This article explores the history of UFO sightings, investigations, and the cultural impact of the subject since World War II, including notable events like the Roswell incident, Project Blue Book, and the rise of UFO conspiracy theories.

title: As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us?
description: For generations, human beings have wondered: What would alien life from another planet be like.

title: Nearly a century of wondering: The American UFO saga, in reality and in fiction
description: UFOs have intrigued people for decades, with sightings and investigations dating back to the first widely reported one in 1947

title: Trump orders UFO files release, revives debate: What would aliens think of humans?
description: As Trump orders UFO file release, scientists debate a deeper question—if aliens exist, what would they think of humanity? Explore science, sightings, and speculation.
